name: Meem Se Mohabbat
overview: ‘Meem Se Muhabbat’ revolves around a moving tale that artfully intertwines coincidence and destiny, bringing together two souls who could not be more dissimilar in their essence. In a world brimming with uncertainties, love manifests in the most unforeseen moments, defying the boundaries of logic, past and circumstance.
